mainEntity.name: What if intoxicated during ladder fall in Millcreek?
mainEntity.text: What if intoxicated during ladder fall in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah bars benefits if 0.05%+ BAC or drugs caused fall; defense must prove via tox screen.

suggestedAnswer.text: Millcreek: Presumption if positive test, but rebut with non-work source. Off-duty use protected unless impaired at work. 20% claims denied this way—challenge chain of custody.

name: Intoxication Defenses in Ladder Claims
description: Utah bars benefits if 0.05%+ BAC or drugs caused fall; defense must prove via tox screen.
